body_text:
FYI â October 2020
FYI â October 2020
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Currency Volume
FX Notes Plus Part
We added procedures on how to attach a note or small file to individual transaction receipts.
Changes to the Document Library
We updated the contact information for Saskatchewan and Atlantic credit unions on applicable forms.
Other changes to the Document Library are detailed in the table below.
Document Library
Status
PaymentStream AFT User Request
5330
We made the PaymentStream AFT User Request, Form 5330, obsolete, as credit unions manage their access and permissions in User Management.
The PaymentStream AFT User Request for Business Members, Form 6257, is still available on the secure site for credit unions that want an editable form to use internally for their business customers.
Obsolete
Central 1 Facilitated CEBA Application Procedures Quick Reference Guide
9140
Section 7.3, Reporting Requirements
We added information to clarify where Central 1 accredited credit unions can view previous loan administration fee payments.
Revised
Questions
Central 1, Client Support Services, phone
1-888-889-7878
, Option 1, email
support@central1.com
